title: Motivational Monday | Work In Progress
excerpt: I strive to be a better version of myself. Some days it's easier than others, but I'm a work in progress. Trying to grow and evolve and be the best version of myself. Especially lately, I've found myself turning inward…
body:
I strive to be a better version of myself. Some days it's easier than others, but I'm a work in progress. Trying to grow and evolve and be the best version of myself. Especially lately, I've found myself turning inward and examining different ways I can do better. Do you all have any tips on how you approach this during particular challenging times? Would love to hear about it and any favorite quotes in the comments below!

I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and a waterbrush that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger.
